title: Mail is morale infrastructure
discovery: Letters and packages should be treated like an infrastructure system because they control home attachment, censorship, and the emotional rhythm of long campaigns.
evidence: source_library/46_military_mail.md:15-17 - military mail explicitly shapes morale and memory.
source_library/43_united_states_army_during_world_war_ii.md:15-17 - daily life includes repetitive food, hygiene, and boredom, which mail interrupts.
source_library/55_chaplain_corps_united_states_army.md:15-17 - moral support and grief processing sit adjacent to mail in unit life.
why: Mail arrival can be a meaningful event, not a cosmetic flavor line.

variable.name: mail_latency
variable.definition: Time between sending and receiving home contact.

mechanic: Delayed letter and package events that adjust morale and memory.
pressure: Long silence is a kind of attrition.
